title: Boss Whackers
description: OP Swords to one-hit Minecraft Bosses
body:
[![fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/)
[![quilt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/quilt_vector.svg)](https://quiltmc.org/en/install/client/)

[![neoforge](https://boypika.github.io/images/neoforge.svg)](https://neoforged.net) [![forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/forge_vector.svg)](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/)

Adds a way to one-shot all of the bosses that exist in Vanilla Minecraft. If it wasn't obvious enough, these are not early game items and should only be obtained in the late game to become more powerful and to generally make the harvesting of nether stars easier to make beacons faster.

Crafting Recipes
================

### Wither Whacker

![Recipe for the Wither Whacker has a Nether Star in Row 1 Column 2, Netherite Blocks across Row 2, and a Stick in Row 3 Column 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e43741dbbc9f76973decfbdba1308ed2348959ad_0.webp)

### Dragon Whacker

![Recipe for the Dragon Whacker has Dragon's Breath in Row 1 Column 2, Nether Stars across Row 2, and a Wither Whacker in Row 3 Column 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fb04b72bf518b715376605462856f5b0496adef_0.webp)

### Warden Whacker (1.19.3+ only)

![Recipe for the Warden Whacker has the Otherside Music Disc in Row 1 Column 2, Enchanted Golden Apples across Row 2, and a Stick in Row 3 Column 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7180a11ce48d3a04379bd9d3c0cd9be286d3b6c.png) 
  

[![crowdin](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/translate/crowdin_vector.svg)](https://crwd.in/boss-bashers)
